title: Model Dispatch Simulator
description: Simulate the provider decision chain for a protocol, model name, and provider groups.
noGroups: No provider groups are currently configured.
genericError: Failed to run the dispatch simulator
finalCandidatesDescription: {count} provider(s) remain in the selected priority tier {priority}.
noCandidatesDescription: No provider survived the full decision chain for this input.

notes.no_group_filter: No provider groups were selected, so the group filter was skipped.
notes.model_filter_skipped_for_resource_reques: The request has no model name, so allowlist filtering is skipped for resource-style requests.
notes.redirect_preview_skipped_for_resource_re: No model name was provided, so redirect preview is skipped.
notes.redirects_apply_after_provider_selection: Model redirects are evaluated after provider selection.
notes.endpoint_status_does_not_change_provider: Endpoint status is shown as downstream risk and does not currently change provider pre-selection.
notes.user_group_sticky_skipped_no_group: No single group selected; user-group sticky is skipped.
notes.user_group_sticky_skipped_multi_group: Multiple groups selected; V1 does not enable sticky for multi-group users — selection falls back to weighted random.
notes.user_group_sticky_skipped_unknown_group: The selected group does not exist; sticky config could not be loaded.
notes.user_group_sticky_disabled: Sticky is disabled for this group; selection still uses existing weight/priority logic.
notes.user_group_sticky_config_unavailable: Failed to read sticky config (DB/cache hiccup); selection falls back to existing logic.
notes.user_group_sticky_enabled_uncapped: Sticky enabled (no cap configured). Actual cap and load filtering run at request time using live Redis state and are not simulated here.
notes.user_group_sticky_enabled_capped: Sticky enabled (per-account active-user cap configured). Actual cap, hit, and load filtering all run at request time using live Redis state and are not simulated here.
